mapper.sql: select r.rule_id, r.rule_name, r.indicator_id, coalesce(i.indicator_name, r.indicator_name) as indicator_name, r.warning_level, r.threshold_type, r.threshold_value, r.trigger_condition, r.trigger_frequency, r.push_channels, r.push_targets, r.content_template, r.effective_mode, r.effective_time, r.status, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from nc_warning_rule r left join nc_fusion_indicator i on i.indicator_id = r.indicator_id
mapper.insert: insert into nc_warning_rule (rule_name, indicator_id, indicator_name, warning_level, threshold_type, threshold_value, trigger_condition, trigger_frequency, push_channels, push_targets, content_template, effective_mode, effective_time, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{ruleName}, #{indicatorId}, #{indicatorName}, #{warningLevel}, #{thresholdType}, #{thresholdValue}, #{triggerCondition}, #{triggerFrequency}, #{pushChannels}, #{pushTargets}, #{contentTemplate}, #{effectiveMode}, #{effectiveTime}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
